changes: Added Notifications config parsing (Webhook URL + On events token set) in Configuration section
Added run_id generation (ISSUE_ID_YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSz compact UTC) in Step 0 MCP pre-flight
Added pipeline-started webhook fire after state.json init

Added pre-dispatch usage fields (started_at, model, status=in_progress, zeroed counters) for: triage, code_analysis, reproduction, fixer_reviewer, test, e2e_test, browser_verification, acceptance_gate, publisher
Added post-dispatch defensive usage capture (tokens_used, duration_ms, tool_uses, completed_at) for all stages
Added cumulative accumulation for fixer_reviewer across iterations (COST-R5)

Added step-completed webhook fire after each stage's state commit: triage, code_analysis, reproduction, fixer_reviewer (once, not per-iteration), test, e2e_test, browser_verification, acceptance_gate, publisher
Added pipeline accumulator (total_tokens, total_duration_ms, total_tool_uses, summary_table) on both success path (Step 9) and block path (Step X)
Added COST-R10 truncation rule for summary_table (max 20 rows / 4000 chars with truncation notice row)
Added summary_table stdout emit on both success and block paths
Added pipeline-completed webhook fire on both success (outcome: success) and block (outcome: blocked) terminal states
On events filter applied before every webhook fire — silent skip if token absent
